query:
SELECT pc.id, pc.cityId, c.name as cityName, 
pc.currentProfitStage, 
pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
pc.profitRatioStage3Partner,
pc.expenseCoverage,
pc.isInvestmentRecovered
FROM partner_cities pc 
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%重庆%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT pc.id, pc.cityId, c.name as cityName, 
pc.currentProfitStage, 
pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
pc.profitRatioStage3Partner,
pc.expenseCoverage,
pc.isInvestmentRecovered
FROM partner_cities pc 
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%重庆%';
